summary:
Mission Control is Credologi's operational dashboard for monitoring and managing:
- AWS infrastructure (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, SQS, Cognito)
- User management via Cognito
- Security alerts from AWS Security Hub
- Data pipeline flows (lending data lake)
- CI/CD pipelines via CodeBuild
- Cost monitoring and test runner
Current: Lambda Node.js via SAM, React TypeScript Vite, Cognito auth, API Gateway, DynamoDB

user_stories.title: User Authentication
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to securely log in and register so that my data is protected.
acceptance_criteria: User can log in with valid credentials
Password is hashed and stored securely

user_stories.title: User Profile Management
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to manage my profile so I can keep my information up to date.

user_stories.title: RESTful API Endpoints
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want well-documented API endpoints so I can integrate with the system.

user_stories.title: Data Persistence Layer
user_stories.description: As the system, I need reliable data storage so that user data is safely persisted.
acceptance_criteria: Database schema designed for the domain

user_stories.title: User Interface
user_stories.description: As a user, I want an intuitive interface so I can easily use the application.

user_stories.title: Notification System
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to receive notifications so I stay informed about important events.

user_stories.title: File Upload
user_stories.description: As a user, I want file upload functionality.

user_stories.title: Analytics Dashboard
user_stories.description: As an admin, I want analytics dashboards so I can understand usage patterns.

user_stories.title: Ci Cd
user_stories.description: As a user, I want ci cd functionality.

non_functional_requirements.description: API response time under normal load
